unit.name: wpdb mysqli @:phpGlobal receiver-less call proof
unit.area: wp-includes/class-wpdb.php and Haxe PHP target extern metadata
unit.public_contract: Typed Haxe mysqli externs can lower through the stock PHP target to reflection-friendly global PHP calls: mysqli_query($handle, $query) and mysqli_fetch_object($result). The committed WPHX-305.17 live candidate still uses WPHX_305_17_MysqliBoundary until the next wpdb candidate integrates these externs and reruns the live database gates.

bridge.reason: The official PHP stdlib uses @:phpGlobal for global native functions. Applying the same metadata to a typed mysqli extern class emits receiver-less PHP globals and avoids Dynamic, untyped, raw php.Syntax.code, broad casts, and generated PHP postprocessing.
bounded_by: generated PHP lint and call-shape proof

removal_gate.condition: Replace WPHX_305_17_MysqliBoundary in a live wpdb candidate by calling MysqliGlobal.query()/MysqliGlobal.fetchObject() from typed Haxe-owned/native-shell code, then rerun WPHX-305 live MySQL/MariaDB gates.

smell_fixes.description: Reframed the WPHX-305.18 custom-target assumption: no custom PHP target is needed for this specific mysqli global-call shape because stock @:phpGlobal extern metadata emits idiomatic global calls.

notes: This is a compiler/backend proof and typed extern scaffold, not yet the live wpdb candidate integration. WPHX-305.20 owns replacing the generated boundary in the live candidate.
